_comment: Canonical current model per provider slug. Ships in the package and rides Trinity releases — the local-first 'how does the user learn a new model launched' signal (no server). When a lab ships, bump the entry + release a Trinity point version; the user receives it via `trinity-local update`, and `detect_new_models()` diffs it against the model they last evaluated to surface a 'score it against your taste' nudge. `model` MUST match the slug's config.model (what eval-run records as target_model) for the diff to fire.

claude.whats_new: Anthropic's latest flagship — adopted as Trinity's default Claude voice.

codex.whats_new: OpenAI's codex-tuned GPT-5.5, dispatched via the Codex CLI.

antigravity.whats_new: Google's flagship, dispatched via the Antigravity (agy) CLI.
